overview.title: Execution Pipeline & Data Flow
overview.subtitle: From product intake to billing events, this is not a collection of isolated features — it is a continuous data chain built around shared project_id, mention_id, and tracking_url values.

highlights.label: Continuous Data Chain
highlights.desc: 6 stages linked by project_id / mention_id / tracking_url — fully traceable end-to-end

highlights.label: Async Orchestration
highlights.desc: Decoupled stages coordinated by task queue, with retry and rollback support

highlights.label: Billing Loop
highlights.desc: From reply publication to funnel_events — triggers Credits deduction and partner revenue sharing

overview.description: MOTA is not a set of isolated features — it is a full end-to-end execution pipeline from product intake to billing events. Each stage produces data structures consumed by downstream stages, forming a continuous data flow loop.

stages.title: Six-Stage Execution Pipeline
stages.subtitle: From product intake to billing feedback — each stage is decoupled and asynchronously orchestrated.

stages.label: Product Intake
stages.desc: The user enters product details and creates a projects record.

stages.label: Product Analysis
stages.desc: The LLM infers pain points, competitors, platforms, and structured queries.

stages.label: Scanning
stages.desc: Scanner Agents collect mentions, scan_logs, and raw content.

stages.label: Mining & Validation
stages.desc: pain_points are aggregated, five-axis validation is triggered, and priorities are assigned.

stages.label: Reply Generation
stages.desc: Create reply_queue entries, tracking_url values, quality_score values, and review states.

stages.label: Tracking & Billing
stages.desc: reply_logs and funnel_events feed back into billing, reporting, and partner revenue.

data-flow.title: Key Data Flows
data-flow.subtitle: 6 core data flows connecting each stage, ensuring a complete and traceable data chain.

flows.desc: The product analysis engine writes platform queries and multilingual settings into the task queue.
Scanners collect content and record source, platform, cost, and execution results.
The Mining Agent performs pain-point extraction, cross-source merging, and five-axis scoring.
Highly relevant mentions enter the reply generation queue together with product context.
After manual or automatic approval, replies are published and written into permanent logs.
Clicks and conversion events trigger deductions, monthly closing, reporting, and partner revenue sharing.
